result.full_text: Thank you for calling the non-emergency line. This is AI Assistant Athena, how can I help you? Hi there. I'm hoping to speak with Officer Martinez. His badge number is 4521, about a traffic stop from last week. I have some questions about the citation he gave me and would really like to discuss it with him directly, if possible. What address was the incident report created for? Oh sure, I can give you that. The traffic stop happened near the intersection of Westbury Street and Hemphill Street in Fort Worth. Do you need the exact address or is that intersection enough? that intersection works so the incident location is Westbury Street and Hem Hill Hill Street in Fort Worth. Can you please verify your phone number? My phone number is 817-555-1234. Would you like me to confirm any other details? Got it, that's 817-555-1234. three four what is your first name and can you please spell it out for me Yes, of course. My first name is Jessica. J-E-S-S-I-C-A Jessica got it and what is your last name please spell it out for me as well Sure. My last name is Ramirez, R-A-M-I-R-E-Z. Do you have or know your report or incident number? I don't have the report number with me right now, unfortunately. Unfortunately, is there another way you can look it up, maybe with my name or the date of the stop? No problem. Can we go ahead and summarize what I have? The incident address is the intersection of West Berry Street and Hemphill Street in Fort Worth. Your phone number is 817-555-1234. Your name is Jessica Ramirez, and you don't have a report or incident number available at this time. Is that all correct? Yes, that's all correct. Thank you for confirming everything. I am transferring you to an agent. Please stay on the line. The transfer is now complete. Stay on the line for the next available call taker.
